title: Opening for Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
